testcase.name: Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should encode data as SSE format
Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should create case event
Chat Module Extractions > SSE Encoding > should create done event
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should build messages with system and history
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should build messages with image attachments
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should extract chunk content from OpenAI response
Chat Module Extractions > OpenAI Client Helpers > should handle empty/missing content
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should accept empty attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should reject too many attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should filter valid attachments
Chat Module Extractions > Attachment Validation > should build vision instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should parse labor hours from message
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should detect labor override intent
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should normalize and format labor hours
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should check canonical total labor line
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should compute labor override request
Chat Module Extractions > Labor Override > should detect final report format
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should enforce language policy by stripping translation
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should extract primary report block
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback with complaint context
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build final report fallback with translation
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should apply diagnostic mode guard
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build diagnostic drift correction instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Output Policy > should build diagnostic drift fallback
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build translation instruction
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build final report request
Chat Module Extractions > Final Report Service > should build transition constraints
Chat Module Extractions > Logging > should log timing without throwing
testcase.system-out: [Chat API v2][timing] {"stage":"test","value":123}

testcase.name: Chat Module Extractions > Logging > should log flow without throwing
testcase.system-out: [Chat API v2][flow] {"stage":"test","step":"init"}

testcase.name: No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/chat-request-preparer.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/chat-mode-resolver.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/prompt-context-builder.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/response-validation-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/final-report-flow-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > src/lib/chat/openai-execution-service.ts does not import diagnostic authority modules
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > mode resolver refuses semantic mode inference
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > fallback rendering only mirrors supplied authoritative step metadata
No Hidden Authority — Route Decomposition > route remains the boundary that invokes Context Engine directly
OpenAI Execution Service > retries invalid diagnostic output and falls back to the authoritative step
testcase.system-err:
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_1, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_DRIFT: Output looks like a final report while in diagnostic mode. Diagnostic mode must ask questions, not generate reports.'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_MODE_GUARD: Diagnostic mode output must not use final report section format'[39m, [32m'STEP_COMPLIANCE: Response does not match active step wp_2. Expected question about: voltage, measure, water, pump, input'[39m ]
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_1, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_DRIFT: Output looks like a final report while in diagnostic mode. Diagnostic mode must ask questions, not generate reports.'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_MODE_GUARD: Diagnostic mode output must not use final report section format'[39m, [32m'STEP_COMPLIANCE: Response does not match active step wp_2. Expected question about: voltage, measure, water, pump, input'[39m ]

testcase.name: OpenAI Execution Service > returns a valid labor override response without introducing flow logic
Chat Route Decomposition Services > parses request bodies and trims the message
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates attachment bundles without hidden flow logic
Chat Route Decomposition Services > keeps prior language on short acknowledgements
Chat Route Decomposition Services > auto-switches tracked language only on strong non-ack evidence
Chat Route Decomposition Services > ensures the case with explicit language source resolution
Chat Route Decomposition Services > resolves stored mode normalization without semantic inference
Chat Route Decomposition Services > changes modes only on explicit commands
Chat Route Decomposition Services > builds bounded prompt constraints and preserves vision instruction
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates primary responses and builds authoritative correction/fallback text
Chat Route Decomposition Services > validates labor override outputs and builds retry instructions
Chat Route Decomposition Services > builds the labor override execution plan with explicit final-report transport
Chat Route Decomposition Services > persists messages and diagnostic cleanup through the bounded service
testcase.system-out: [Chat API v2][timing] {"stage":"load_history","caseId":"case_1","loadHistoryMs":0}

testcase.name: Chat Route Wiring > emits SSE success lifecycle once without duplicate done events
Chat Route Wiring > emits error and done once on upstream failure
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should return 500 when OPENAI_API_KEY is missing
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should return 400 when message is missing
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should process chat with mocked OpenAI response
testcase.system-err: [ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_123, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m ]

testcase.name: Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should handle session-only image attachments
testcase.system-err: [ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_123, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m ]

testcase.name: Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should detect Spanish RV diagnostic input and keep diagnostic dialogue in Spanish
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should keep existing Spanish dialogue language on short acknowledgment
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should force Spanish output when message explicitly requests Spanish
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should force Russian output when message explicitly requests Russian
Chat API Route > POST /api/chat > should force English output when message explicitly requests English
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > STRICT_CONTEXT_ENGINE is enabled by default
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: Locate request: "capacitor"

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine processMessage is always called in diagnostic mode
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: Diagnostic response

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > legacy shouldPivot is NOT used for flow decisions
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: Diagnostic response

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > replan is handled ONLY by Context Engine
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: New evidence (physical_damage): "wait, I found a refrigerant leak on the condenser..." [ContextEngine] Replan triggered: New physical_damage evidence after isolation: wait, I found a refrigerant leak on the condenser

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > clarification is handled ONLY by Context Engine topic stack
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: How-to request: "capacitor"

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > no dual-authority: isolation + new evidence = replan (not dual pivot)
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: New evidence (physical_damage): "Actually, I just noticed there's a hole in the eva..." [ContextEngine] Replan triggered: New physical_damage evidence after isolation: Actually, I just noticed there's a hole in the evaporator coil

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > loop guard prevents legacy-style fallback loops
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > step completion is synced from registry to Context Engine
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > anti-loop directives are generated by Context Engine
Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine result has valid structure for route consumption
testcase.system-out: [ContextEngine] Intent: Diagnostic response

testcase.name: Route Strictness — Context Engine Only > Context Engine handles invalid/missing context gracefully
Data Provider Isolation — Registry as Read-Only > buildRegistryContext returns step metadata (data only)
Data Provider Isolation — Registry as Read-Only > initializeCase provides procedure catalog (data only)
